action: Model canonical-snapshot versus append-only current-state divergence without overwriting historical sources.

handoff_chain: Model contradictions as linked records rather than overwriting earlier observations
Materialize a deterministic continuity-owned current view
selected_from.selection_reason: No active continuity-owned item remained in the canonical queue; the highest-priority unresolved continuity handoff was the unmodeled divergence between the stale canonical snapshot and newer append-only updates.

memory_recovered: The repository uses two state layers: a historical canonical snapshot and newer append-only team updates. Their differing views are representational divergence, not automatically a logical contradiction.

contradictions_resolved.apparent_conflict: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json appears to omit completed continuity items M-002 through M-004.
contradictions_resolved.resolution: The canonical file is an older snapshot; append-only records and the derived current-view manifest extend present-state interpretation without invalidating the older historical record.
contradictions_resolved.remaining_unresolved: Completeness of the replay set is not yet proven by a full repository-tree enumeration.

inferred: single-source consumers can report stale state
unresolved: complete enumeration of all continuity-owned queue updates

verification.method: Cross-read ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, continuity-index.json, current-view manifest commit, and recent repository commits.
verification.result: The divergence is directly observable and is represented without mutating either source layer.
verification.falsification_route: Show that ACTIVE_QUEUE.json already incorporates every later continuity update, or show that the cited current-view manifest does not contain M-002 through M-004.

privacy_boundary: Only public repository metadata and abstract queue-state claims were retained. Raw chat, health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads remain excluded.
next_action: Implement and test a complete repository-tree enumerator that discovers continuity-owned queue updates and reduces them into a deterministic current view.
